system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

model_output: Excellent! I've confirmed all 5 TRUE entries with "configuration key" and "confirmed by the regional verification panel". Now I'll sort them alphabetically and compute the hash:

args.command:
python3 << 'EOF'
import hashlib

# Confirmed entries (alphabetically sorted by entity name)
pairs = [
    ("Ironwell", "K-2210"),
    ("Jorrith", "K-3306"),
    ("Kilthorne", "K-4499"),
    ("Larren", "K-5588"),
    ("Maerstone", "K-6677")
]

# Build the pipe-separated string
result_string = "|".join([f"{entity}={value}" for entity, value in pairs])
print(f"String to hash: {result_string}")

# Compute SHA-1 hash
hash_digest = hashlib.sha1(result_string.encode()).hexdigest()
print(f"SHA-1 hash: {hash_digest}")
EOF
args.description: Compute SHA-1 hash of the sorted configuration key pairs

tool_returns.detail:
